projects.name: My Vite App
projects.tagline: what it does in a few words
projects.essence: A 2-4 sentence description of what this app actually does — shown as the card body. The /gallery skill fills this in from the project's README/code.
projects.notes: Any launch caveat to surface on the card.

projects.name: My Next App
projects.essence: Next.js dev server. Its dev script may hardcode a port; the trailing -p flag overrides it.

projects.name: App With A Backend
projects.essence: A project that needs more than one process: e.g. a FastAPI backend plus a Vite frontend. List both in procs; readyPort is the one you open in the browser.
